name: Stats Detail
description: Detailed statistical breakdown panel showing confidence distributions, percentile bars, metric comparisons, and drill-down tables for quantitative analysis.

standard.description: Full statistical breakdown with distribution chart, percentile bars, and comparison table — suitable as a primary analysis view or dashboard panel

compact.description: Condensed stats for sidebar or card placement — key percentiles and a mini distribution bar only, no table

comparison.description: Side-by-side metric comparison layout — two or more metric groups displayed in columns with delta indicators

visual_brief: A structured statistics panel with a header showing the primary metric in large text (text-2xl, font-bold) alongside a trend indicator badge (d-annotation with data-status). Below, a horizontal distribution chart renders as a segmented bar with labeled breakpoints. Percentile rows display as labeled progress bars (0-100%) with the current value marked by a small indicator. A comparison table uses d-data styling with alternating muted rows, showing metric name, value, delta, and a mini sparkline. All numeric values use tabular-nums for alignment. Section headings use d-label styling with accent left-border.

layout_hints.numbers: All numeric values must use font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums (or the mono-data class) for proper columnar alignment.
layout_hints.distribution_bar: The distribution chart is a single horizontal bar divided into colored segments. Each segment width is proportional to its percentage. Labels sit below each segment. Total bar height: 24-32px.
layout_hints.percentile_bars: Percentile indicators are horizontal bars with a filled portion up to the percentile value. Use CSS gradient or width percentage. Mark P50 and P95 with small tick marks.
layout_hints.comparison_deltas: Delta values show +/- change with color coding: positive = success, negative = error, neutral = text-muted.

slots.header: Primary metric display with large value, label, and trend badge (d-annotation). Optional subtitle with time range or scope description.
slots.distribution: Horizontal segmented bar chart showing value distribution across categories or buckets. Each segment is color-coded and labeled with percentage and count. A legend below maps colors to category names.
slots.percentiles: Vertical stack of labeled percentile bars. Each row: label (P50, P90, P95, P99), progress bar filled to percentile value, and numeric value right-aligned. Key percentiles (P50, P95) are visually emphasized with bolder treatment.
slots.comparison-table: Data table (d-data) with columns: Metric, Current Value, Previous Value, Delta (%), Trend. Delta column uses color-coded badges. Rows are sortable. Footer shows aggregate or average row.
slots.breakdown-cards: Optional grid of small metric cards showing detailed sub-metrics. Each card: icon, label, value, and mini sparkline or trend arrow.

keyboard: Enter expands detail for selected metric
accessibility.focus_management: Focus moves to first interactive element in each section on tab

responsive.mobile: Distribution bar stacks vertically as a list of labeled bars. Comparison table scrolls horizontally. Percentile bars remain horizontal but reduce padding. Header metric stacks label above value.
responsive.tablet: Standard layout maintained. Comparison table fits without scrolling for up to 5 columns. Grid cards use 2-column layout.
responsive.desktop: Full layout with side-by-side sections possible. Comparison table shows all columns. Breakdown cards use 3-4 column grid.

composition.StatsDetail: Container(d-section, flex-col, gap-6) > [Header + Distribution + Percentiles + ComparisonTable + BreakdownCards?]
composition.Distribution: Card(d-surface) > [Label(d-label) + SegmentedBar(flex, rounded) + Legend(flex, gap-4, text-sm)]
